steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage's focus on Evelyn Cunningham’s work in civil rights journalism and the role of the National Association of Black Journalists highlights a central theme: the recognition and preservation of Black journalism history. A strong clue is the phrase “rich history” tied to both individual journalists like Cunningham and organizations honoring this legacy.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: C captures the shift exactly by discussing the importance of Black journalism's history in the United States and its preservation through professional associations. A, B, and C each miss the contrast or focus too narrowly on one aspect without encompassing both elements of the story — Cunningham’s work and the broader historical context addressed by the NABJ. That matches choice C — C is correct.
